canonical_name: Abang Abdul Rahman Johari bin Openg

primary_sources.title: Sarawak State Election 2021 results: GPS 76 of 82 seats
T4A issue 1731 (Sarawak election polls 2025-2027 cycle): GPS faces strongest challenge since 2016

notes: Sarawak Premier (the title replaced Chief Minister 2022 per state constitutional amendment). PBB-GPS leadership. GPS won 76 of 82 seats in 2021 state election but 18 had margins under 2000 votes (T4A issue 1731). With GRS the 49-MP federal bloc demanding Ministry of Borneo Affairs (T4A issue 1705). Sarawak election due by 2027.
